description: Hand-written cross-core parity cases, one entry per detection-target behavior. Unlike golden_*.json these are NEVER regenerated. Consumed by tests/integration/test_parity_cases.py (Python, full pipeline) and web/packages/core/test/parity-cases.test.ts (TS, regex-only Anonymizer). Semantics: must_mask values must be absent from the anonymized text and covered by a span of the given entity_type; min_count >= 2 additionally requires that many masked occurrences and a single reused label; must_not_mask values must survive verbatim; must_not_detect forbids spans of that entity_type over the value; every case asserts deanonymize(anonymize(text)) == text. cores selects which consumer asserts the case (PERSON/LOCATION are python-only: the TS unit suite runs without a NER model; divergent cases carry one entry per core).

cases.text: Contact me at taro@example.com or stop by the desk.
資料の送付先のメールは taro@example.com までお願いします。

cases.notes: Known divergence: Presidio's EmailRecognizer uses \b boundaries, which never match between CJK and ASCII, so the Python core misses fully CJK-adjacent emails (pinned in tests/unit/test_recognizers.py). The TS regex has no boundary and masks it.

cases.text: Send the invite to a.b+tag@mail.example.co.jp today.
The handle not-an-email@nowhere is not a real address.
cases.notes: TS email regex requires a dot-TLD. Python-side negative is pinned at unit level; the full pipeline is kept out to avoid NER noise on the synthetic token.

cases.text: ｶﾌﾞｼｷｶﾞｲｼｬﾔﾏﾀﾞのﾔﾏﾀﾞ ﾀﾛｳです。電話は090-1234-5678、メールは taro@example.com です。
cases.notes: Halfwidth katakana names/companies appear in legacy forms; structured PII must still mask around them. PERSON/ORG on halfwidth script is NER-dependent and not asserted here.

cases.text: 携帯は09012345678までお願いします。
ご注文はフリーダイヤル0120-123-456へどうぞ。
オフィスの電話は03-1234-5678です。

cases.notes: Digit lookbehind: a mobile-shaped run inside a longer digit run must not be masked.
Digit lookahead: trailing extra digit disqualifies the mobile/landline match.

cases.text: 宛先は〒1000001としてください。

cases.notes: The marked-postal recognizer is registered for every language in both cores.
Known divergence (documented, not hidden): Python's bare-postal pattern (0.3) is lifted above the 0.4 threshold by the 郵便番号 context word. See the ts twin below.

Known divergence: the TS core has no context boosting, so bare NNN-NNNN stays at 0.35 < 0.4 and is never masked. Aligning this is a product decision out of scope for tests (AGENTS.md: threshold/score changes are review-blocking).

cases.text: 折り返しは090-1234-5678へお願いします。
cases.notes: The bare postal pattern must not fire inside a phone number.
Valid check digit (body 12345678901 -> 8). Must be classified as My Number, not credit card (the 12-digit run fails Luhn).

cases.text: 個人番号は 9876-5432-1093 で登録済みです。
cases.notes: Valid check digit (body 98765432109 -> 3), 4-4-4 hyphen grouping.

cases.text: マイナンバーは 5555 5555 5557 です。
cases.notes: Valid check digit (body 55555555555 -> 7), space grouping.
Wrong check digit (8 expected, 9 given); also fails Luhn so no recognizer may claim it.
A valid 12-digit My Number embedded in a longer digit run must not match (lookarounds); the 16-digit run also fails Luhn.

cases.text: お支払いのカード番号は4111111111111111です。

cases.notes: Fails the Luhn checksum by one.
13-digit runs starting with 1 (millisecond timestamps) are explicitly excluded in both cores.

cases.text: プロジェクトXの資料は明日、プロジェクトX担当者に渡してください。
cases.notes: Deny-list matching is plain substring: CJK-adjacent, no word boundaries, every occurrence masked with one reused label.

cases.text: Codename Bluebird must not leak. Bluebird v2 ships in May.
窓口のメールは taro@example.com です。個人アドレスは hanako@example.org です。
cases.notes: Allow-listed values survive even when a recognizer detects them; other values of the same type are still masked.
Consistent labeling: the same value must reuse a single label across occurrences.

cases.text: John lives in New York. Contact John at john@example.com.
cases.notes: NER targets are python-only here: the TS unit suite runs without a model (see e2e:ner / weekly CI for the TS side).

cases.text: お世話になっております。山田太郎と申します。折り返しは 090-2222-3333 までお願いします。
cases.notes: Text mirrors the golden 'request' genre that the ja sm model handles.

cases.text: 次回の会場の住所は 東京都千代田区丸の内1丁目 です。

must_mask.value: 東京都千代田区丸の内1丁目

cases.notes: Span may extend beyond the value; overlap of a LOCATION span is what is asserted.
